description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gitlab-registry.cern.ch/fitters/xfitter:with_docker Docker image (and the docker image for the packaging job) with two stages: test and package. Define a hidden .install_dependencies template that runs `echo "ha"` before each script. In the test stage add jobs `job-ceres-fit` and `job-ceres-parallel` that run `./tools/install-qcdnum`, `./tools/install-numdiff`, `. setup.sh`, `./make.sh install` and then `./tools/test.sh CERES-fit` or `./tools/test.sh CERES-parallel`, set `CMAKE_FLAGS=-DCMAKE_DISABLE_FIND_PACKAGE_ROOT=TRUE`, keep artifacts (install.log, temp/**/test.log, temp/**/xfitter.log, temp/**/output) expiring in 2 days on failure, and trigger only on merge_requests and schedules. Also add `job-dyturbo`, `job-install-full`, `job-install-minimal`, `job-scanmin`, and `job-tmd` with their respective scripts (including yum installs, datafile cloning, lhapdf downloads, and specific test commands), the same artifacts and triggers, and set the CMAKE_FLAGS variable where required (scanmin always uploads artifacts). Finally, in the package stage add `job-docker` using the docker image, the docker:dind service, running `docker info`, logging in to the registry, building and pushing `gitlab-registry.cern.ch/fitters/xfitter:master`, limited to schedules, with tag `docker-privileged-xl` and a 120‑minute timeout.
